INKLUYO · ACCESSIBILITY WIDGET · 1 LINE OF CODE

This page sucks. ON PURPOSE.

Inkluyo is a widget you install with one line of <script>. It lets your visitors adapt your site to their needs — dyslexia, low vision, reduced mobility and more — without you touching a single component.

We built this page terribly so you can feel what 1 in 4 web users feels every day. The little floating button on the right? That's the widget. Click it. Watch this nightmare turn human.

Yes, that one. → Try it.

OK, I'm ready. Make my site accessible.

30-second install. Cancel anytime. Free tier forever, no card.

Get Inkluyo
© Inkluyo · Built by people who actually care about accessibility.
If you read this without help, hire a designer. 🫡
